calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
